summary: Updated the local-to-server roadmap so Phase 2 becomes fixture worlds and fixture sets. BYO MCP config moved to Phase 3 as the private fixture-world recording path. The plan now states what belongs in this repo versus the future datalox-replay-fixtures repo.

agentTurn.user_prompt: how to do Phase 2 should start defining fixture worlds / fixture sets, not just BYO MCP config, update the .html, by what to do in this repo, anything to do in datalox-replay-fixture?
agentTurn.assistant_summary: Updated docs/local-to-server-engine-plan.html to make Phase 2 the fixture worlds and fixture sets milestone. The roadmap now defines fixture pack and fixture set schemas, install-vs-replay semantics, target commands, collision rules, runtime behavior, pass criteria, and the split between this repo and a future datalox-replay-fixtures repo. BYO MCP config is now Phase 3 and framed as the private-world recorder that can promote recorded bundles into private fixture packs.

tool_calls.output_summary: Focused docs and identity gates passed: 2 files, 12 tests.

file_changes.diff_summary: Replaced Phase 2 BYO MCP config with fixture worlds and fixture sets. Added target commands for fixtures install, replay --fixture, replay --fixtures, fixture-sets install, and replay --fixture-set. Added fixture pack and fixture set manifest examples, pass criteria, repo-boundary guidance, and updated server-ready architecture, release gates, and recommended next tasks. Moved BYO MCP config to Phase 3.

verification.command: PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npx vitest run tests/replayCanonicalDocs.test.ts tests/repoIdentity.test.ts && PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:$PATH" npm run check && git diff --check
verification.evidence: Focused docs and identity gates passed: 2 files, 12 tests. TypeScript no-emit check passed. git diff --check passed.
